entries.definition:
ḍ-m-m group of people of different lineage, to draw together,
to hug, to draw close to oneself, to combine, to gather, to join;
devious; glutton. Of this root, اضمم ʾuḍmum, occurs twice in the
Qurʾan.

اضمم ʾuḍmum [imper. of v. ضمّ ḍamma, trans.] to draw in close,
to embrace (20:22) واضمم يدك إلى جناحك تخرج بيضاء من غير سوء draw
your hand into your side (or, place your hand tightly under your
armpit) it will come out white without a blemish.
entries.definition_english:
ḍ-m-m group of people of different lineage, to draw together,
to hug, to draw close to oneself, to combine, to gather, to join;
devious; glutton. Of this root, اضمم ʾuḍmum, occurs twice in the
Qurʾan.

اضمم ʾuḍmum [imper. of v. ضمّ ḍamma, trans.] to draw in close,
to embrace (20:22) واضمم يدك إلى جناحك تخرج بيضاء من غير سوء draw
your hand into your side (or, place your hand tightly under your
armpit) it will come out white without a blemish.
